title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・どうして？

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: There you have it. A display of my true power.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Argh! You gotta tell me when you decide what
race you're entering next!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And what will you do then?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll take you on again, duh! I'm beating you next
time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...A pointless notion.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times you face me, the
outcome will never change. I will always win.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ugh, this is just the worst!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: McQueen told me I'll never win against her!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
As if I'd let her keep beating me! Doesn't she
know I'm gonna be more awesome than Prez
someday?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: If she doesn't wanna race me, then I'll just have to make her wanna race me!
choice_data_list: What are you going to do?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win a huge race and show her what I
got! Then she'll have to admit I'm a real threat!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So my next race has gotta be a suuuper amazing
one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her loss to Mejiro McQueen, Tokai Teio's
talent is unmistakable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she keeps growing, she'll definitely be capable
of winning the bigger races.
choice_data_list: Let's go for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Now we're talking the big, big leagues! Prez
has won that one too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All righty, time to get right back to training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the spring Tenno Sho behind us, we set our
sights on the next grand stage. But the following
day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How was that, Trainer? Can I run or what?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And yet McQueen said I'm no match for her...
Grrrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after a good night's sleep, Tokai Teio still
seems to be all worked up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah! Prez is training over there! Hey, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio. You're already training after your race? You
must be very eager indeed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, I am shooting for the Japan Cup,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But anyways, you gotta hear this, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
McQueen told me I'll never beat her! Can you
believe that?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh... And what is your own opinion?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'd let her beat me again! After all,
I'm aiming to surpass even you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I did amazing in my classic year and
everyone knows how talented I am.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You think so too, right? What the heck is
McQueen even talking about?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...No, I am in agreement with McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As you are now, no matter how many times you
may face her, the outcome will not change.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you talking about?! We haven't
even had a rematch yet!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Given McQueen's Tenno Sho performance and
your own current state, the difference is crystal
clear.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio, I would advise you to give this some careful
consideration. Think about what she has that you
lack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio is starting to train for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her new journey begins on shaky
ground.
